actions.text:
ParentText is easiest to use when you receive content as videos, images and text. However, your data bundle and bandwidth may not support videos. To save on data, you can choose to receive the same content with a smaller audio file or as text. How would you like to receive ParentText?

Select one of the options below:
1. With Videos
2. With Audio
3. Text and Images Only

text:
ParentText is die maklikste om te gebruik wanneer jy inhoud as video's, prente en teks ontvang. Jou databondel en bandwydte kan egter dalk nie video's ondersteun nie. Om data te bespaar, kan jy kies om dieselfde inhoud met 'n kleiner oudiolêer of as teks te ontvang. Hoe wil jy graag ParentText ontvang?

Kies een van die opsies hieronder:
1. Met Videos
2. Met Oudio
3. Slegs Teks en Prente
Jammer, ek verstaan nie wat jy bedoel nie.

I-ParentText kulula ukuyisebenzisa xa ufumana umxholo ngeevidiyo, imifanekiso kunye nemibhalo. Noxa kunjalo, idatha yakho kunye ne-bandwidth ayinakuzixhasa iividiyo. Ukugcina idatha, unokukhetha ukufumana umxholo ofanayo kunye nefayile yesandi encinci okanye njengombhalo. Ungathanda ukuyifumana njani i-ParentText?

Khetha enye yeenketho ezingezantsi:
1. Ngeevidiyo
2. Nge-audio
3. Umbhalo kunye ne Mifanekiso Kuphela
Uxolo, andiqondi ukuba uthetha ukuthini.

actions.text:
We are sorry to hear that ParentText is not working on your phone. Here are a few steps you can try: 

1. Ensure you have the latest version of WhatsApp installed on your phone. 
2. Check your internet connection to make sure it's stable. 
3. Send a message on WhatsApp to 0786407885 to get additional help. Be sure to share your user ID. Your user ID is @contact.id

text:
Ons is jammer om te hoor dat ParentText nie op jou foon werk nie. Hier is 'n paar stappe wat jy kan probeer: 

1. Maak seker dat jy die nuutste weergawe van WhatsApp op jou foon geïnstalleer het. 
2. Kyk na jou internetverbinding om seker te maak dit is stabiel. 
3. Stuur 'n boodskap op WhatsApp na 0786407885 vir addisionele hulp. Maak seker om jou gebruikers-ID te deel. Jou gebruikers-ID is @contact.id

Ndicela uxolo ukuva ukuba i-ParentText ayisebenzi kwifowuni yakho. Nanga amanyathelo ambalwa onokuthi uwazame: 

1. Qinisekisa ukuba unenguqulelo yamva nje ye-WhatsApp efakwe kwifowuni yakho. 
2. Jonga uqhagamshelwano lwe-internet yakho uqiniseke ukuba luzinzile. 
3. Thumela umyalezo ngo-WhatsApp ku 0786407885 ukuze ufumane uncedo olongezelelweyo. Qinisekisa ukuba wabelana ngeID oyisebenzisayo. I-ID oyisebenzisayo ithi @contact.id
